title: Significant Problem, Public Value, and Durable Need · Cumulative Product Review
summary: A delayed review reconstructs significant problem, public value, and durable need from stakeholder, decision, assumption, revision, artifact, observation, changed case, rejected failure, repair, owner, and residual-risk evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for significance and public-value case after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance.
Bound affected populations, contexts, frequency, severity, unequal burden, and who is missing from available evidence.
Study current services, manual workarounds, nonuse, competitors, public infrastructure, and build-nothing options.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Significance Evidence · changed case · Review Significance Evidence
steps.instruction:
review case — A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The review variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

Which action demonstrates Significance Evidence without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Significance Evidence · changed case · Review Significance Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance. For Significance Evidence · changed case · Review Significance Evidence, keep Significance Evidence connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The review variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Significance Evidence condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: GitHub healthy contribution and repository security documentation — Controls contribution guidance, governance, licensing, support, security policy, dependency review, code scanning, secret scanning, and repository stewardship.

hints: For Significance Evidence · changed case · Review Significance Evidence, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Significance Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Significance Evidence · changed case · Review Significance Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The review variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

For Significance Evidence · changed case · Review Significance Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Novel technology makes the addressed problem significant.

options.text: For significance evidence · changed case, apply Significance Evidence without its stated preconditions, omit the significance and public-value case trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Significance Evidence for significance and public-value case.

Triangulate direct research, domain artifacts, credible data, existing services, and counterevidence to establish problem significance. Apply it to the stated input and retain a reproducible trace for significance and public-value case.
Novel technology makes the addressed problem significant. That claim fails the significance evidence · changed case evidence boundary for Significance Evidence.

steps.title: Record what required effort · Review Durability Change
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Durability Change: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A novel technical demonstration lacks durable need evidence, reachable affected people, current alternatives, or a causal route to public value. The review variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Test whether the need persists under policy, market, technology, organizational, and behavior change across the project horizon.

Evidence target: Record what required effort · Review Durability Change.
steps.why: Retrieving Durability Change through the concrete significance and public-value case case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Record what required effort · Review Durability Change, keep Durability Change connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Test whether the need persists under policy, market, technology, organizational, and behavior change across the project horizon.
